info.description: REST API for the Helptrix helper marketplace platform.
info.title: Helptrix API

post.description: Authenticates a user by email and password, returns a Paseto token
Creates a helper or business user with address and categories

get.description: Returns all categories available on the platform (public catalog)
Lists proposals for the authenticated user. Business users see proposals they created; helpers see proposals directed at them. Supports optional status filter.

parameters.description: Filter by proposal status (pending, accepted, refused, in progress, cancelled, finished)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Creates a new service proposal from a business user directed at a helper. Only business users can create proposals.

get.description: Returns a proposal by ID. Only participants (business owner or helper) can access it.

patch.description: Updates the status of a proposal following the allowed state machine transitions. Helpers manage most transitions; both parties can cancel.

get.description: Lists all services for the authenticated helper user

post.description: Creates a new service offering for the authenticated helper user

get.description: Returns a specific service by its ID for the authenticated helper user

put.description: Updates fields of an existing service for the authenticated helper user

delete.description: Soft-deletes a service for the authenticated helper user

get.description: Returns a user profile by ID, with optional filters for business users

parameters.description: Filter services by category ID (business only)
parameters.name: category_id

parameters.description: Filter services by actuation day (business only)
parameters.name: actuation_day

put.description: Updates mutable fields of a user profile. Only the owner can update.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user profile. Only the owner can delete.
